criteria.notes: Multiple ADS components (PageHeader, Page, Grid, Heading, Table, Menu, PageFooter) imported and rendering correctly with proper styling.
Screenshot shows Amsterdam brand colors (red logo, blue nav), Amsterdam Sans typography, and proper ADS spacing consistent with token usage.
Agent edited main.tsx (content not shown in transcript) and likely intended compact.css import, but spacing in screenshot appears generous and doesn't clearly confirm compact mode is active.
PageHeader with Amsterdam logo, 'Vergunningen' brand, and blue navigation panel; PageFooter with Privacy/Toegankelijkheid/Contact links both properly styled.
NewPermitWizard.tsx created (19,760 chars) and agent consulted Field/Label/ErrorMessage docs, but form is not visible in the screenshot to verify visual correctness.
ADS Table clearly visible with proper header row, 8 body rows, horizontal separators, bold column headers, and sort indicator.
Only @amsterdam/design-system-* and react-router-dom installed; no MUI, shadcn, Chakra, or other banned libraries.
NewPermitWizard.tsx exists with substantial code (19,760 chars) but the wizard is not visible in the screenshot to verify step indicators.
Agent consulted ErrorMessage component docs and validation is likely coded, but not visible in the screenshot.
Agent consulted InvalidFormAlert reference and likely implemented it, but not visible in the screenshot.
Agent consulted TextInput, Select, Radio, DateInput, Checkbox docs; inputs likely coded but not visible in screenshot.
Step 4 summary likely implemented in wizard code but not visible in the screenshot.
All visible text fully in Dutch: headings, paragraphs, column headers, status values, navigation labels, filter, and footer links.
Clear B1-level Dutch with active voice: 'Hier ziet u aanvragen...' and 'Dit is het overzicht van alle vergunningaanvragen...'
Status labels in Dutch (Ingediend, In behandeling, Goedgekeurd, Afgewezen) and filter labels ('Filter op status', 'Alle statussen').
React Router configured with three routes ('/', '/nieuw', '/zaak/:id') and navigation links visible and functional in screenshot.
Agent edited tsconfig.app.json to add strict mode (build caught type errors proving TS checking active), but the build failed and code doesn't compile cleanly.
